scores.notes: Response describes a full implementation with code snippets but doesn't show the complete _on_pebble_ready method or charm.py in full, making it impossible to fully verify correctness. Snippets shown are syntactically valid. Uses DatabaseRequires from data_platform_libs (real library) as an alternative to direct relation.data access — valid but different from gold standard approach. Pebble layer structure is correct with override:replace, add_layer, replan, on-check-failure, and http check. Status management (Blocked/Waiting/Active) is a nice addition. Level 'alive' used instead of gold standard's 'ready' — both valid. All APIs referenced appear genuine.
